name: Cheeseburger Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart saucepan, brown the beef and drain.
2. Add the chopped onion, shredded carrots, diced celery, dried basil, and dried parsley to the same saucepan. Cook over medium heat until the vegetables are tender for about 10 minutes.
3. Stir in 1 tablespoon butter until melted.
4. Add chicken broth and diced potatoes; bring mixture to a boil.
5. Reduce heat and cover. Simmer for 10-12 minutes or until the potatoes are tender.
6. In a small skillet, melt remaining butter. Add flour and cook until bubbly.
7. Stir in the flour mixture into the soup and bring back to a boil.
8. Cook and stir for an additional 2 minutes.
9. Reduce heat to low.
10. Add American cheese, milk, salt, pepper, and mix until the cheese melts.
11. Remove from heat and blend in sour cream.
